models.name: fgm05_swa_s42_swa
models.config: FGM epsilon=0.5, SWA avg epochs 10-14, seed=42

techniques: DeBERTa-v3-large backbone with multi-task learning (entity presence auxiliary head)
Aggressive O-class downweighting (weight=0.2) to boost entity recall
R-Drop consistency regularization (KL divergence between two forward passes)
FGM adversarial training with Stochastic Weight Averaging
5-model ensemble with logit averaging for prediction diversity
